PackList.title: Streamer
positive_prompts:
Create a high-quality cartoon caricature illustration based on the input photo.

STRICT IDENTITY PRESERVATION:
- Keep the same facial structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, hairstyle, and hair color as the input photo
- The person must be immediately recognizable as the same individual
- Do NOT change gender, ethnicity, or age

FACIAL EXPRESSION:
- Make the expression playful, cheerful, slightly mischievous
- Bright eyes, cheeky smile, fun vibe
- Slight caricature exaggeration but keep likeness accurate

STYLE:
- Cartoon / caricature illustration, clean smooth line art
- Soft shading, vibrant colors, semi-3D polished digital illustration
- High detail, professional, not childish

POSE & COMPOSITION:
- Person sitting at a streamer desk, upper body visible, facing camera
- Hands on desk near keyboard/mouse or holding a controller
- Natural confident posture

STREAMER DESK & PROPS (add many streamer-related objects):
- Large microphone on boom arm with pop filter
- Audio interface / mixer (e.g., stream deck / soundboard)
- Dual monitors showing OBS-like streaming layout (chat window + live preview)
- RGB mechanical keyboard, gaming mouse, mousepad
- Ring light / softbox light, small camera/webcam on tripod
- Headphones on stand, gaming controller
- Streaming signboards: “LIVE”, “ON AIR”, subscriber counter
- Neon LED strips, colorful ambient lighting
- Shelves with awards/trophies, creator plaques, figurines
- Chat bubbles / notification overlays as subtle UI elements
- Sticky notes with content ideas, schedule planner, script pages
- Snack props: energy drink, coffee cup, chips, seltzer can
- Tech clutter: cables, SD cards, lens cap, portable SSD
- Optional: green screen folded in the corner

BACKGROUND:
- Cozy home studio / streamer room
- Posters, LED panels, wall foam acoustic panels
- Depth of field, background slightly blurred but objects still readable

LIGHTING:
- Soft studio light on face, warm highlights, clean contrast
- Slight rim light from LED strips

QUALITY:
- Ultra high resolution, sharp, clean details, no artifacts
PackList.negative_prompt: face alteration, changed lips, changed eyes, floating body, cartoon look, warped hands, extra fingers, blur, watermark, logo, text

PackList.title: Cafe Vibes
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use the attached photo as the ONLY facial reference. Preserve exact facial structure, bone shape, eye shape, eye color, nose shape, lip shape, jawline, chin, and facial proportions. Transform into stylized caricature while maintaining core facial identity.

CALICATURE STYLE (CRITICAL): High-quality digital caricature with deliberately oversized head proportions and smaller body. Stylized vector-art aesthetic with clean, bold black outlines and smooth cel-shading. Vibrant but grounded colors.

FACIAL FEATURES: Large expressive eyes matching original eye color, prominent smile showing white teeth, arched eyebrows. Preserve original facial structure in caricature form - same eye spacing, nose bridge, lip proportions, face shape.

HAIR: Long voluminous wavy hair flowing over shoulder, matching original hair color and texture in stylized form.

POSE & SCENE: Sitting at small marble bistro table in brightly lit modern cafe, holding green mint mojito cocktail in stemmed glass. Wide joyful open-mouthed laugh expression.

OUTFIT: Tight-fitting long-sleeved horizontal striped shirt (black and white) with brown button-down placket, paired with black trousers. Delicate silver jewelry including drop earrings, thin necklace, and bracelet. Manicured nails.

BACKGROUND: Blurred warm-toned cafe interior with wooden chairs, soft pendant lighting, cozy atmosphere.

COMPOSITION: 9:16 vertical portrait, medium shot from waist up. Bright even studio lighting highlighting face contours and hair texture.

STYLE: Clean vector-art aesthetic, bold outlines, smooth cel-shading, vibrant saturated colors, professional digital caricature illustration, 8K quality.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, unchanged face, normal proportions, no caricature style, small head, proportional head, no outlines, no cel-shading, flat colors, dull colors, sketchy lines, rough edges, low quality, blurry, face reshaping beyond caricature style, completely different facial features, wrong eye color, cartoon anime style, 3D render, watermark, logo, signature, text, borders, frames, margins, white space, grey bars

PackList.title: Boss Babe
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve core facial structure, eye shape, eye color, nose shape, lip proportions, face shape in stylized caricature form.

CALICATURE STYLE: High-end 2D digital vector illustration, "Bitmoji-luxe" style. Vibrant saturated colors, clean bold outlines, soft cel-shading. White painterly brushstroke border around edges.

FACIAL FEATURES: Large almond-shaped expressive eyes matching original eye color with thick voluminous black feathery eyelashes, sharp winged black eyeliner. Perfectly groomed arched eyebrows. Smooth airbrushed complexion with soft peach-pink blush on cheekbones. Small refined nose. Full symmetrical lips with glossy nude-pink finish and subtle lip liner.

HAIR: Voluminous wavy blonde hair with honey highlights, parted down middle, tucked behind one ear revealing large gold hoop earring.

EXPRESSION: Confident friendly "boss-babe" smirk with direct gaze at viewer.

OUTFIT & POSE: Vibrant crimson red tailored blazer over layered gold chain necklace. Sitting at desk holding modern black smartphone in one hand and takeaway coffee cup with brown sleeve in other.

DESKTOP DETAILS: Chaotic luxury-themed workspace with silver laptop with fruit logo, thick stacks of hundred-dollar bills, gold coins, luxury red lipsticks, makeup brushes in gold holder, designer handbag, classic gold watch.

BACKGROUND: Floating dollar bills in air. Shelves filled with high-end perfume bottles and designer accessories.

9:16 vertical, vibrant colors, clean lines, boss-babe aesthetic, professional digital illustration, 8K quality.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, normal proportions, no caricature style, no outlines, no cel-shading, flat colors, dull colors, poor workspace, empty desk, no money, no luxury items, sketchy lines, low quality, blurry, completely different face, wrong eye color, 3D render, watermark, text, borders, frames

PackList.title: Gym Queen
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve core facial identity, eye shape, eye color, facial structure in high-quality 3D digital caricature form.

CALICATURE STYLE: High-quality 3D digital caricature, trendy 3D avatar style, Octane render, vibrant saturation, sharp focus, clean lines, whimsical yet professional digital art finish, 8K resolution.

FACIAL DETAILS (HYPER-FOCUS): Large expressive almond-shaped shadowless eyes with deep chocolate brown irises matching original eye color, realistic catchlights (white reflections) giving glassy depth. NO eyelashes around eyes. Thick voluminous black mascara-coated lashes fanning out at corners. Perfectly arched groomed eyebrows with visible fine hair strokes. Subtle shimmering champagne eyeshadow, sharp black winged eyeliner flick, soft rosy-pink blush on cheekbones. Full symmetrical pouty lips with soft satin mauve-pink finish and defined cupid's bow. Flawless glowing porcelain skin with smooth airbrushed texture, soft highlights on nose bridge and forehead.

HAIR: Long voluminous honey-blonde hair with sun-kissed highlights, styled in deep bouncy waves swept to one side, intricate texture with individual golden strands catching light.

POSE & OUTFIT: Medium shot, confidently holding pink 5lb dumbbell in right hand, left hand on hip. Pink leopard-print crop top and black high-waisted leggings.

BACKGROUND: Vibrant cluttered boutique gym with colorful fitness gear - pink dumbbells, rolled purple yoga mats, green smoothie bottles with orange slices, pink shaker bottle, motivational posters saying "Keep Going" and "Start Now."

LIGHTING: Bright cinematic studio lighting, soft pastel color palette (pinks, blues, teals).

9:16 vertical, 3D rendered caricature, vibrant fitness aesthetic, 8K quality.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, 2D flat art, normal proportions, no 3D rendering, dull colors, plain gym, no equipment, no motivational elements, sketchy quality, low resolution, blurry, completely different face, wrong eye color, dark lighting, watermark, text, borders

PackList.title: World Traveler
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve facial identity, eye shape, eye color, face structure in modern 3D animation style.

CALICATURE STYLE: High-quality 3D digital illustration in modern animation style (Disney/Pixar inspired), Octane render, 8K resolution, vibrant color palette, clean vector-like edges with 3D volume.

FACIAL DETAILS (MICRO-DETAIL FOCUS): Large expressive almond-shaped eyes with deep chocolate-brown irises matching original eye color, high-gloss reflections in pupils simulating studio lighting. Thick dark well-defined eyelashes, perfectly groomed arched eyebrows. Soft symmetrical face with gentle sweetheart chin. Subtle confident smile showing hint of friendliness. Small elegant gold hoop earrings. Smooth porcelain-like skin texture with soft peach glow on cheeks. Natural semi-matte pink lips. High-definition rendering of facial planes creating depth.

HAIR: Long wavy blonde hair with natural flow and volume.

OUTFIT & POSE: Centered medium shot, dressed as stylish traveler in brown checkered blazer over cream-colored top. Carrying large olive-green hiking backpack loaded with rolled sleeping bag and binoculars. Holding vintage black DSLR camera around neck and silver handheld compass in left hand.

BACKGROUND: Vibrant busy travel-themed collage with blue sky, white clouds, hot air balloons, white airplane. Stylized postcards of Eiffel Tower, blue passport, world globe, magnifying glass, directional signpost pointing to "PARIS," "TOKYO," and "RIO."

LIGHTING: Bright cinematic three-point lighting with soft shadows.

TEXTURE: High-detail fabric textures on tweed blazer and canvas backpack.

9:16 vertical, 3D animated caricature style, travel adventure theme, 8K quality.
PackList.negative_prompt: photorealistic, realistic photo, 2D flat art, normal proportions, no 3D rendering, plain background, no travel elements, dull colors, low quality, blurry, completely different face, wrong eye color, dark moody lighting, watermark, text, borders

PackList.title: Mindful Moments
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve facial identity, eye shape, eye color, facial structure in modern 2D digital art caricature.

CALICATURE STYLE: Modern 2D digital art style, clean vector-like lines combined with soft airbrushed shading. High saturation with warm golden color palette. Aesthetic Pinterest-style illustration, 8K crisp details.

FACIAL DETAILS: Large expressive almond-shaped eyes with honey-brown irises matching original eye color, realistic highlights catching warm room light. Thick dark perfectly groomed eyelashes, soft arched eyebrows. Gentle serene smile with soft pink lips. Smooth porcelain finish skin with subtle peach-toned blush on cheekbones. Soft but defined jawline conveying calm mindful expression.

HAIR: Long wavy blonde hair with sun-kissed highlights and natural flow.

POSE & OUTFIT: Centered medium close-up shot, sitting at cozy wooden desk, resting chin thoughtfully on hand. Light blue off-the-shoulder cable-knit sweater. Delicate silver jewelry including small pendant necklace and thin hoop earrings.

DESK DETAILS: Open journal with two pens, blue mug with gold crescent moon steaming gently, small crystals, lit white candles, affirmation cards reading "I am enough" and "Worthy of love."

BACKGROUND: Warm blurred indoor setting with bookshelves showing titles like "Personal Growth" and "Mindset Shift." Soft fairy lights and glowing candles creating magical hygge atmosphere.

THOUGHT BUBBLES: Three floating thought bubbles with text: "My journey is beautiful," "Focusing on me," and "Mindful living."

9:16 vertical, warm golden tones, self-care aesthetic, professional digital illustration, 8K quality.

PackList.title: Content Creator
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve facial identity, eye shape, eye color, facial structure in stylized glamorous caricature.

CALICATURE STYLE: Clean 2D vector-influenced digital painting with soft cel-shading, vibrant colors, bold crisp outlines. High-quality digital illustration aesthetic.

FACIAL DETAILS: Extremely large expressive almond-shaped eyes with deep amber-brown irises matching original eye color, fine detailed highlights within pupils suggesting ring-light reflection. Thick voluminous jet-black mascara with flared-out cat-eye lashes. Perfectly arched groomed blonde eyebrows. Flawless luminous peach-toned skin with subtle airbrushed glow on cheekbones, soft rosy blush on apples of cheeks. Full symmetrical lips with soft coral-pink satin finish and subtle cupid's bow highlight. Confident friendly soft smile (closed mouth) looking directly at camera.

HAIR: Long voluminous wavy blonde hair with platinum highlights, styled in soft beachy waves draped over shoulders.

JEWELRY: Large thin polished gold hoop earrings.

SETTING: Cozy cluttered Content Creator desk with MacBook displaying blog layout, pro DSLR camera with large lens, tripod-mounted smartphone, ring light, white coffee mug, pink over-ear headphones.

BACKGROUND: Warm cream-colored room with wooden bookshelf, potted succulents, floating digital Social Media icons (red heart bubbles and blue chat bubbles with "1" notifications).

LIGHTING: Bright front-facing studio lighting creating clean shadowless look on face, soft highlights on hair.

9:16 vertical, vibrant content creator aesthetic, professional digital illustration, 8K quality.

PackList.title: Real Estate Star
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve facial identity, eye shape, eye color, facial structure in high-end vibrant caricature.

CALICATURE STYLE: High-end vibrant digital caricature, clean outlines, smooth cel-shading, bright saturated colors, professional illustration quality.

FACIAL EXPRESSION: Radiant wide smile showing perfectly straight white teeth. One eye playfully winking, other eye wide expressive and deep warm brown matching original eye color with sharp glassy catchlight. Long dark meticulously defined eyelashes. Groomed dark naturally arched eyebrows.

FACIAL DETAILS: Soft airbrushed glow with subtle rosy blush on apples of cheeks, hint of warm highlights on nose bridge and forehead. Gentle heart-shaped face with defined but soft jawline. Long voluminous glossy raven-black hair with individual fine strands catching light, styled in soft waves over shoulders.

ATTIRE & ACCESSORIES: Pale blue pleated high-neck blouse with delicate ruffle details and black ribbon tied in bow at center. Elegant silver drop earrings with pearl-like finish. Holding shining gold "Number 1" trophy in one hand, set of brass house keys in other.

BACKGROUND: Celebratory busy real estate-themed collage - modern luxury villa with pool, "Vendido" (Sold) sign, happy couple giving thumbs up, yellow Lisbon-style tram, private jet in blue sky with confetti, laptop showing floor plans.

LIGHTING: Bright cinematic sunny lighting with slight golden-hour rim light highlighting hair.
